line_technical_records.source_document: IGORA ROYAL technical instructions, developer usage, application methods (445122692-schwarzkopf-quick-starter-guide(1).pdf pp. 7-10)
assumptions: Aggregated from normalized seed package technical_rules (batch11)
developer_options: igora_royal_natural_standard_use: {"white_hair_coverage_pct": 100, "mixing_ratio": "1:1", "developer_volumes": [10, 20, 30], "processing_time_min": [30, 45], "notes": "Natural shades cover up to level 9."}

igora_royal_fashion_lights: {"usage": "lift and color in one step", "max_lift_levels": 5, "mixing_ratio": "1:1", "developer_volume": 40, "processing_time_min": [30, 45], "application": "off_scalp_only", "starting_base": "6 and darker; dark or colored bases"}

igora_royal_virgin_application: {"apply_to": "dry_unwashed_hair", "steps": ["apply first on mid-lengths and ends in fine sections leaving 1/2 inch regrowth out", "develop 10 minutes or 15 minutes for Fashion Shades", "apply to regrowth", "develop 30-45 minutes"]}

igora_royal_regrowth_application: {"apply_to": "dry_unwashed_hair", "steps": ["apply color only to regrowth area first in fine sections", "develop 15-20 minutes", "apply IGORA ROYAL or IGORA VIBRANCE demi-permanent color to mid-lengths and ends", "develop 10-15 minutes"]}

igora_royal_dual_application: {"description": "Permanent IGORA ROYAL for regrowth with IGORA VIBRANCE non-ammonia demi-permanent color for mid-lengths and ends.", "steps": ["apply permanent IGORA ROYAL to regrowth first", "develop 15-20 minutes depending on mids/ends product", "apply IGORA VIBRANCE to mid-lengths and ends", "development time depends on desired intensity and instructions"]}
gray_coverage_rules: igora_royal_nature_extra_resistant_hair: {"condition": {"sub_range": "Nature Extra", "tone_code": "00"}, "action": {"white_hair_coverage_pct": 100, "mixing_ratio": "1:1", "default_developer_volume": 30, "processing_time_min": [30, 45], "tip": "For pure color deposit on more than 90% white hair use 20 vol."}}

igora_royal_fashion_gray_blending_mix_natural: {"condition": {"sub_ranges": ["Cendré Plus", "Gold/Gold Extra", "Gold Copper", "Chocolate", "Chocolate Gold", "Chocolate Red", "Copper/Copper Extra", "Red Extra", "Violet Red/Violet Extra"], "gray_pct_range": [50, 100]}, "action": {"white_hair_coverage_pct": 70, "mixing_ratio": "1:1", "coverage_formula": "2 parts Fashion Shade : 1 part Natural Shade for 50-100% white hair; fashion shade alone up to 50%; mix 1:1 with natural shade on thick/resistant hair", "developer_volumes": [10, 20, 30], "processing_time_min": [30, 45]}}

igora_royal_absolutes_mature_hair: {"condition": {"line": "IGORA ROYAL Absolutes", "tone_codes": ["40", "50", "60", "70", "80", "90"]}, "action": {"white_hair_coverage_pct": 100, "mixing_ratio": "1:1", "developer_volume": 30, "processing_time_min": [30, 45], "tip": "For pure color deposit on more than 90% white hair use 20 vol."}}
special_usage_notes: igora_royal_95_series_pastel_toning: {"brand": "Schwarzkopf Professional", "product_line": "IGORA ROYAL Pastels", "rule_category": "toning", "rule_name": "igora_royal_95_series_pastel_toning", "rule_condition": {"sub_range": "Pastels", "target_level_min": 9, "hair_state": "pre_lightened_pale_yellow"}, "rule_action": {"mixing_ratio": "1:1", "developer_volume": 10, "processing_time_min": [5, 30], "process_visually": true, "usage": ["personalization", "white refining", "neutralization after lightening"]}, "source_key": "schwarzkopf_professional_igora_royal_quick_starter_technical_p7_10"}

igora_royal_booster_amount: {"brand": "Schwarzkopf Professional", "product_line": "IGORA ROYAL Creative Mixtones", "rule_category": "tone", "rule_name": "igora_royal_booster_amount", "rule_condition": {"modifier_codes": ["0-55", "0-77", "0-88", "0-89", "0-99"]}, "rule_action": {"max_pct_of_color_cream": 50, "usage": "boost fashion tone directions on all levels", "increase_developer_proportionally": true, "warning": "type and amount of mixtone influence target depth"}, "source_key": "schwarzkopf_professional_igora_royal_quick_starter_technical_p7_10"}

igora_royal_d0_diluter: {"brand": "Schwarzkopf Professional", "product_line": "IGORA ROYAL Extracts", "rule_category": "tone", "rule_name": "igora_royal_d0_diluter", "rule_condition": {"modifier_code": "D-0"}, "rule_action": {"max_pct_of_color_cream": 50, "usage": ["reduce pigment concentration", "create soft pastel tones"], "developer_volume": 10, "processing_time_min": [5, 30], "can_be_used_with_10vol_for_shine_on_light_bases": true, "mixing_ratio_when_pure": "1:1"}, "source_key": "schwarzkopf_professional_igora_royal_quick_starter_technical_p7_10"}

igora_royal_e1_extra_cendre_additive_by_base: {"brand": "Schwarzkopf Professional", "product_line": "IGORA ROYAL Extracts", "rule_category": "tone", "rule_name": "igora_royal_e1_extra_cendre_additive_by_base", "rule_condition": {"modifier_code": "E-1", "usage": "mixed_with_target_shade"}, "rule_action": {"mixing_ratio_by_base": [{"base_levels": [8, 7], "ratio": "2:1 shade:E-1"}, {"base_levels": [6, 5], "ratio": "1:1 shade:E-1"}, {"base_levels": [1, 2, 3, 4], "ratio": "1:2 shade:E-1"}], "processing_time_min": [30, 45], "usage_note": "extra cool tone direction"}, "source_key": "schwarzkopf_professional_igora_royal_quick_starter_technical_p7_10"}

igora_royal_e1_extra_cendre_pure: {"brand": "Schwarzkopf Professional", "product_line": "IGORA ROYAL Extracts", "rule_category": "tone", "rule_name": "igora_royal_e1_extra_cendre_pure", "rule_condition": {"modifier_code": "E-1", "usage": "used_pure"}, "rule_action": {"mixing_ratio": "1:1", "developer_volume": 10, "processing_time_min": [30, 45], "usage": "extra deposit of cool pigments"}, "source_key": "schwarzkopf_professional_igora_royal_quick_starter_technical_p7_10"}

igora_royal_developer_10_vol_usage: {"brand": "Schwarzkopf Professional", "product_line": "IGORA ROYAL", "rule_category": "developer", "rule_name": "igora_royal_developer_10_vol_usage", "rule_condition": {"developer_volume": 10}, "rule_action": {"recommended_uses": ["coloring darker", "covering 100% white hair depending on texture", "color deposit on pre-lightened hair", "pastel shades"]}, "source_key": "schwarzkopf_professional_igora_royal_quick_starter_technical_p7_10"}

igora_royal_developer_20_vol_usage: {"brand": "Schwarzkopf Professional", "product_line": "IGORA ROYAL", "rule_category": "developer", "rule_name": "igora_royal_developer_20_vol_usage", "rule_condition": {"developer_volume": 20}, "rule_action": {"recommended_uses": ["tone-on-tone", "white hair coverage", "lifting 1-2 levels", "can achieve 2 levels on fine hair", "Absolutes deposit >90% white hair"]}, "source_key": "schwarzkopf_professional_igora_royal_quick_starter_technical_p7_10"}

igora_royal_developer_30_vol_usage: {"brand": "Schwarzkopf Professional", "product_line": "IGORA ROYAL", "rule_category": "developer", "rule_name": "igora_royal_developer_30_vol_usage", "rule_condition": {"developer_volume": 30}, "rule_action": {"recommended_uses": ["lifting 2-3 levels", "-00 series", "Absolutes gray coverage", "10-series up to 3 levels", "12-series 3-4 levels"]}, "source_key": "schwarzkopf_professional_igora_royal_quick_starter_technical_p7_10"}

igora_royal_developer_40_vol_usage: {"brand": "Schwarzkopf Professional", "product_line": "IGORA ROYAL", "rule_category": "developer", "rule_name": "igora_royal_developer_40_vol_usage", "rule_condition": {"developer_volume": 40}, "rule_action": {"recommended_uses": ["Fashion Lights", "10-series 3-4 levels", "12-series 4-5 levels"]}, "source_key": "schwarzkopf_professional_igora_royal_quick_starter_technical_p7_10"}
